title: PQF Product Definition
description: Schema for products/{id}.yaml — defines a product tracked by the Product Quality Framework.

id.description: Unique product identifier. Must be kebab-case and match the YAML filename (without .yaml).

name.description: Human-readable product name shown in the UI.

description.description: One-sentence description of what the product is.

lifecycle.description: Current maturity stage of the product.

target_medal.description: The medal tier this product is working toward achieving.

ownership.description: Ownership and stakeholder information for the product.

squad.description: The engineering squad responsible for this product.

stakeholders.description: Teams or groups with a stake in this product's quality.

users.description: Known user groups or audiences for this product.

documentation_url.description: URL to the product's public documentation (e.g. Charmhub page).

allure_report_url.description: Base URL of the Allure test report, e.g. https://canonical.github.io/{repo}/_latest. Used by the test_verification scorer.

components.description: Component repositories grouped by role. The first foundational component is the primary repo used by most scorers.

foundational.description: Core components that implement the product's main functionality.

feature.description: Optional feature components that extend the product.

auxiliary.description: Supporting components (e.g. databases, operators) the product depends on.
